settings.text:
Welcome to our new Online Store!

We're excited to welcome our valued customers to our new website and online store. Thank you for stopping by to check out our new look!

In addition to an updated design, we are excited to announce that our new website features many technical improvements to enhance your overall shopping experience.

As we complete our scheduled improvements today, some of our website features may be temporarily unavailable as we work to complete our migration. This will include:

  1. Outstanding Customer account balances
  2. Customer Favourite Lists

If you have an existing customer account, you will soon receive an account activation email with a secure link to reactivate your account.

Save $10.00!

As a thank you for visiting our new site, we would like to offer you a one-time discount of $10.00 if you spend $100.00 or more! This will be applied automatically, no code or coupon needed at checkout!

settings.heading: When will I be able to access my account?
settings.row_content:
You will soon be receiving an account activation email with a secure link to reactivate your account.

This will include your store credit and list of favourite products, along with your order history.

Negative account balances have not been migrated yet, but will be available to reconcile soon.

settings.heading: How do I log into my account on the new website?
settings.row_content:
You will receive an invitation to enable your account. You can follow the link to securely regain access to your account information.

Once we have sent each of our customers a secure link to enable your account on the new website, we will also send out an email newsletter to ensure you do not miss any updates from our team.

If you are concerned that you may have missed any communications from us, please do not hesitate to reach out to our team for an update.

settings.heading: If I don't have an account yet, can I create one?
settings.row_content: If you do not have an account yet but would like to create one, please feel free to to set up an account here. You can also shop online as a guest!

settings.heading: What improvements does the new site have?
settings.row_content:
In addition to a beautiful new design, our new website features:

Improved Navigation: Easily browse our products and find what you’re looking for.

Mobile-Friendly Design: Access our site seamlessly on any device.

Updated Content: Enjoy fresh resources, articles, and tips to enhance your experience with us.

Added Security: Enhance security with improved firewall and network features, increased fraud prevention, additional encryption, strict PCI compliance, and new authentication measures for your peace of mind.

settings.text:
Checkout online as a guest!

Our online store is open for guest-checkout sales, feel free to continue shopping online as we work to migrate your account data.

Save $10.00!

As a thank you for visiting our new site, we would like to offer you a one-time discount of $10.00 if you spend $100.00 or more! This will be applied automatically, no code or coupon needed at checkout!
If you have any other questions about our new website, please reach out to our team.
